title: AIAM-1 Intent Claim
description: Structured assertion of purpose produced by an AI agent at the moment of action.

intent_id.description: Unique identifier for this intent claim

goal_ref.description: Reference to the goal context in the agent's identity claim (goal_id)

action_ref.description: Reference to the action proposal this intent claim accompanies

trigger.description: What event or condition prompted the agent to consider this action

alternatives_considered.description: Other actions the agent evaluated before selecting this one

selection_rationale.description: Why this action was selected over alternatives

expected_outcome.description: Structured description of the expected result of the action

dependency_refs.description: References to prior actions this action builds upon (empty array if none)

timestamp.description: Time at which the intent claim was produced (RFC 3339)

confidence.description: Agent's self-assessed confidence in the action's alignment with the goal
